title: rubus lespinassei
intro: Rubus lespinassei, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry vine, is a plant species belonging to the Rubus genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus lespinassei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus lespinassei can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for convenient and flexible use in traditional medicine.
